critical.mandate: Do NOT re-run any reviews — this workflow only inspects the current Review Gate state
Use the shared protocol at {project-root}/_kratos/core/protocols/review-gate-check.xml for gate evaluation
Use glob {story_key}-*.md to find the story file

step.title: Load Story
step.ask: Which story to check? (provide story key, e.g., E1-S1)
step.action: Find and read the story file matching {story_key}-*.md in {implementation_artifacts}/
Verify story status is 'review' or 'done' — HALT if story is in any other status

step.title: Evaluate Review Gate
step.action: Load and execute the shared protocol: {project-root}/_kratos/core/protocols/review-gate-check.xml
Parse the Review Gate table — verify exactly 6 rows exist (Code Review, QA Tests, Security Review, Test Automation, Test Review, Performance Review)
Classify each row as PASSED, FAILED, or PENDING
If any row is missing or has an invalid status, flag it as an error

step.title: Execute Gate Transition
step.action: If ALL 6 rows PASSED AND all Definition of Done items checked AND story status is 'review': invoke status-sync protocol to transition story status to 'done'
If ALL 6 rows PASSED but DoD incomplete: log "BLOCKED: DoD incomplete" — do NOT transition
If ALL 6 rows PASSED AND story already 'done': log "Story already done. No update needed."
If any row FAILED or PENDING: do NOT change story status

step.title: Generate Gate Status Report
step.action: Append Gate Status Report at the END of the story file, after a horizontal rule (---) separator
step.template-output:
Append a section titled "## Review Gate Status Report" at the very end of the story file, preceded by a --- separator. Include: - Date of check - Overall verdict: ALL PASSED | HAS FAILURES | HAS PENDING - Gate summary table:
| Review | Status | Report | |--------|--------|--------| | Code Review | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — | | QA Tests | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — | | Security Review | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — | | Test Automation | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — | | Test Review | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — | | Performance Review | PASSED/FAILED/PENDING | link or — |
- Transition result: what action was taken (transitioned to done / blocked by DoD / no change) - If FAILED: list failed reviews and recommend re-running them individually - If PENDING: list pending reviews and recommend running them or /kratos-run-all-reviews - If ALL PASSED: confirm story is done

next-step.on_all_passed: Story is done — proceed to /kratos-sprint-status to update sprint tracking
next-step.on_failures: Re-run failed reviews individually, then run /kratos-check-review-gate again
